text.title: SQL Optimization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: Postgres-class DB, slow-query identified in APM, staging snapshot with production-volume data?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; profile app-side or load methodology nosql-patterns

branch.question: Has EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) been captured for the slow query?
Is the query OFFSET-paginated above 1k rows?

conclusion.verdict: verify composite index has equality columns first

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
